# Load the hadith JSON file and inspect few entries
import json, os, sys, re
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
print("Files exist:", os.path.exists(hadith_path), os.path.exists(quran_path))
# Load hadiths
with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadiths = json.load(f)
len(hadiths)

# Show keys of first hadith record
hadiths[0].keys()

# Define normalization functions
import re
arabic_diacritics = re.compile("""
                             ّ    | # Shadda
                             َ    | # Fatha
                             ً    | # Tanwin Fath
                             ُ    | # Damma
                             ٌ    | # Tanwin Damm
                             ِ    | # Kasra
                             ٍ    | # Tanwin Kasr
                             ْ    | # Sukun
                             ـ     # Tatweel
                             """, re.VERBOSE)

def normalize_arabic(s):
    s = s.strip()
    s = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', s)
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)  # remove non arabic/word, but keep arabic letters and underscores
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    # maybe replace 'ى' with 'ي'
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    # collapse whitespace and lower
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s)
    s = s.lower()
    return s

full_span = "لا تَغُلُّوا بِالنَاسِ وَلا تُغَيِّروا بِالنَاسِ وَلا تُخالِطوا بِالنَاسِ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُبَدِّدُ بِالنَاسِ مَن يَشَاءُ وَيُحَيِّي بِالنَاسِ مَن يَشَاءُ"
norm_full = normalize_arabic(full_span)
norm_full

# Build normalized text list and compute similarity metrics
from collections import Counter
def tokens(s):
    return s.split()

def token_f1(a, b):
    # a and b are normalized strings
    ta = tokens(a)
    tb = tokens(b)
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    # compute overlap
    overlap = sum(min(ca[w], cb[w]) for w in set(ca) & set(cb))
    prec = overlap / len(ta)
    rec = overlap / len(tb)
    if prec+rec == 0:
        return 0.0
    f1 = 2*prec*rec / (prec+rec)
    return f1

# Longest common substring length ratio (characters) normalized by length of the longer string maybe or both
def lcs_length(a, b):
    # compute longest common substring length
    # dynamic programming O(n*m)
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    longest = 0
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        newdp = [0]*(m+1)
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            if a[i-1] == b[j-1]:
                newdp[j] = dp[j-1] + 1
                if newdp[j] > longest:
                    longest = newdp[j]
            else:
                newdp[j] = 0
        dp = newdp
    return longest

norm_candidates = []
for i, h in enumerate(hadiths):
    # choose Matn if available else hadithTxt
    text = h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    if not text:
        continue
    norm = normalize_arabic(text)
    norm_candidates.append((i, norm, text))

# compute similarities and collect top 10
scores = []
for i, norm, text in norm_candidates:
    f1 = token_f1(norm_full, norm)
    lcs = lcs_length(norm_full, norm)
    lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(norm_full), len(norm)) if max(len(norm_full), len(norm))>0 else 0
    # also check substring
    is_sub = norm_full in norm or norm in norm_full
    scores.append((f1, lcs_ratio, is_sub, i, text, norm))

# sort by f1 descending then lcs_ratio
scores_sorted = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: (x[0], x[1]), reverse=True)
top = scores_sorted[:30]
for entry in top[:20]:
    print(entry[0], entry[1], entry[2], entry[3])

# Load quranic verses
